nasb.text: Therefore, I indeed will deal in wrath. My eye will have no pity nor will I spare; and though they cry in My ears with a loud voice, yet I will not listen to them.”

esv.text: Therefore I will act in wrath. My eye will not spare, nor will I have pity. And though they cry in my ears with a loud voice, I will not hear them.”

cnv.text: 因此我要以烈怒待他們；我的眼必不顧惜，我也不憐恤；他們雖然在我耳中大聲呼求，我還是不聽他們。”

ccb.text: 因此，我必愤怒地对待他们，我必不顾惜他们，也不怜悯他们，即使他们大声向我呼求，我也不听。”
